title: MikroTik RouterBOARD E50UG, hEX (2024 version)
description: The new successor of the hEX series offers double the performance at the same great price. Whether you are looking for a reliable solution for your home or small office, the hEX ensures seamless and stable connectivity with a powerful upgrade: 512 MB RAM and a dual-core ARM 64-bit 950 MHz processor. With five gigabit Ethernet ports , the hEX is the most cost-effective way to connect your main home or office devices. A USB port can be used to add additional storage for streaming high-quality… The RouterBoard can be powered not only via a standard jack connector but also through passive PoE 12-28 V Device 24 V/0.38 A power adapter
